textByHash.30645d47be001dfde822ae6dfcf5159fb1328a83: Nilsal, iknami. Are you in need of some runes?
textByHash.a841373729de160064b879f12bf85c457f2711a2: A few different places. Used to be that they were mostly from old stockpiles or from trading with the Dwarves of Cam Torum. Now that trade has opened with the east, I get a lot imported as well.
textByHash.343c6a7a94e4d4625edbd67f572875a6760e8e35: The Old Ones had some way to create runes, but we've never discovered how they did so. I'm guessing the dwarves did though, given they never seem to run short on them...
textByHash.5d0a37b36b1348b865f11398efeca2015db8b947: Anyway, after they died, the Old Ones left plenty of runes behind. Some of the earliest settlers here then stockpiled them.
textByHash.267824fba5aab558021eb4e25b2a8ac0399d9d4b: Don't mention it, iknami. Now, would you like to buy some runes?
textByHash.ce2346c9df195efa0d3d44c7dba22788bb838c07: Fair enough, iknami. Timoiva for now.
